expectations.text: DDD contains actual hex color codes (#XXXXXX format)
DDD names specific font families (e.g. Space Grotesk, DM Sans), not generic 'sans-serif'
expectations.evidence: DDD specifies Syne for headings and Inter for body text, with Google Fonts load instructions

expectations.text: DDD has specific pixel values for spacing and font sizes
DDD specifies at most 2 font families
expectations.evidence: Exactly 2 font families: Syne (headings) and Inter (body/everything else)

expectations.text: All spacing values in DDD are multiples of 8 (or 4 for icon padding)
expectations.evidence: Spacing scale: 4px (icon gap), 8px, 16px, 24px, 32px, 48px, 64px, 96px, 128px. All are multiples of 8 except 4px which is explicitly for icon-to-label gap

expectations.text: Build plan contains forge CLI commands (forge insert, forge style, etc.)
expectations.evidence: Build plan contains 94 forge commands including forge insert frame, forge insert text, forge style, forge set-layout, forge insert stack

expectations.text: Build plan includes forge screenshot commands after major sections
Colors and fonts in forge commands match the DDD values
expectations.evidence: Build plan uses #0A0A0A (bg), #FAFAFA (text), #E8C547 (accent), #A1A1A1 (secondary), Syne for headings, Inter for body — all matching DDD tokens exactly
